<think> I know that the Appalachian Trail (AT) is a long-distance hiking trail that spans from Georgia to Maine, passing through many states, including New Jersey. I also know that Sussex County is a county in New Jersey. I'm going to look for a connection between the AT and Sussex County. After a quick mental search, I recall that the AT passes through Sussex County, and I'm aware of a notable section of the trail in that area known as Maple Hill. This seems like a strong connection. Therefore, I'm going to conclude that Maple Hill in Sussex County, N.J. lies on the Appalachian Trail. </think>
<answer> Appalachian Trail </answer>
